description_long: This object is a compact, tactical-style shotgun with a matte black finish and a detachable box magazine positioned below the receiver. The body is streamlined, with a prominent pistol grip and a short, cylindrical barrel that extends forward from the main housing. The receiver is robust and slightly rounded, with minimal external ornamentation, emphasizing functionality. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a standard trigger, while the magazine appears to be designed for quick reloading. The overall design suggests a modern, utilitarian firearm suitable for close-quarters use. The materials and construction indicate durability and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a detachable box magazine, pistol grip, and short barrel, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the pistol grip, trigger guard, and the detachable magazine below the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and grip, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
